versions.version_description: This is the way Tom Petty played it. Includes chord legend, all breaks and backing vocals, and link to video. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1lWJXDG2i0A.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Capo 8th fret to match Petty's recording.


[Intro]
[ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]     x2


[Verse 1]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
She's a good girl, loves her mama[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
Loves Jesus and America too[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
She's a good girl, crazy 'bout Elvis[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]
Loves horses and her boyfriend too[/tab]


[Interlude]
[ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]


[Verse 2]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
And it's a long day livin' in Reseda[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]
There's a freeway runnin' through the yard[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
And I'm a bad boy, 'cause I don't even miss her[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]
I'm a bad boy for breakin' her heart[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
Now I'm free,            free fallin'[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
Yeah, I'm free,            free fallin'[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]
All the vampires walkin' through the valley[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]
Move west down Ventura Boulevard[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]
And all the bad boys are standing in the shadows[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]
And the good girls are at home with broken hearts[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
Now I'm free,            free fallin'[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
Yeah, I'm free,            free fallin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
                      (Free fallin', now I'm, free fallin', now I'm)[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
                      (Free fallin', now I'm, free fallin', now I'm)[/tab]


[Verse 4]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
I wanna glide down over Mulholland[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]
I wanna write her name in the sky[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
I'm gonna free fall out into nothin'[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
Gonna leave this world for a while[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
Now I'm free,            free fallin'[/tab]
